description: LAMMPS input-file self-verification hooks. Stop hook (verify_outputs.py) blocks end_turn when /workspace/inputs/ is missing .in files or files fail the structural check (missing units/atom_style/run). PostToolUse hook (verify_lammps_post_write.py) catches structural problems immediately after each Write|Edit|MultiEdit so the agent gets feedback within seconds instead of at end-of-turn.
